overview: A complete upgrade to the existing Anumaya Sansthan NGO website — adding a gallery admin panel powered by secure login and cloud image storage, four new content pages (Blog, Events, Media, Impact), a full admin dashboard for managing content, and UX improvements to the homepage and navigation.
features: Gallery admin panel with secure login and cloud image uploads
Blog & Stories page with category filtering
Events & Drives page with registration forms
Media & Press page with news mentions and press releases
Impact page with animated counters, SDG alignment, and success stories
Admin dashboard for managing blog, events, gallery, and stories
Homepage trust signals bar and success stories section
CSR/corporate partnership section on Get Involved page
Fully responsive, design-system compliant across all new pages
